---
title: "Gráficos"
author: "Soledad Araya"
date: "2026-04-22"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
rm(list = ls())
```

```{r}
# General
library(tidyverse)

# texto
library(quanteda)
library(quanteda.textstats)
library(tidytext)
library(readtext)
library(stringi)

# ggplot
library(hrbrthemes)
```

Carga de base de datos 

```{r}
dfm_docs <- read_rds("outputs/260422-data_dfm.rds")
```

Para combinaciones:

```{r}
dfm_grouped <- dfm_group(
  dfm_docs,
  groups = interaction(docvars(dfm_docs)$pais,
                       docvars(dfm_docs)$nivel_territorial)
)

topfeatures(dfm_grouped, 50)

df_tidy <- convert(dfm_grouped, to = "data.frame") |> 
  pivot_longer(!doc_id,
               names_to = "palabra",
               values_to = "frecuencia")

df_tidy  |> 
  group_by(doc_id)  |> 
  slice_max(frecuencia, n = 10)  |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(palabra, frecuencia), y = frecuencia, fill = doc_id)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
  facet_grid(cols = vars(doc_id), scales = "free") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_ipsum()
```

Rama feminista

```{r}
dfm_grouped <- dfm_group(dfm_docs, groups = rama_feminista)

topfeatures(dfm_grouped, 50)

df_tidy <- convert(dfm_grouped, to = "data.frame") |> 
  pivot_longer(!doc_id,
               names_to = "palabra",
               values_to = "frecuencia")

df_tidy  |> 
  group_by(doc_id)  |> 
  slice_max(frecuencia, n = 10)  |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(palabra, frecuencia), y = frecuencia, fill = doc_id)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
  facet_grid(cols = vars(doc_id), scales = "free") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_ipsum()
```

Tipo de femócrata

```{r}
dfm_grouped <- dfm_group(dfm_docs, groups = tipo_de_femocrata)

topfeatures(dfm_grouped, 50)

df_tidy <- convert(dfm_grouped, to = "data.frame") |> 
  pivot_longer(!doc_id,
               names_to = "palabra",
               values_to = "frecuencia")

df_tidy  |> 
  group_by(doc_id)  |> 
  slice_max(frecuencia, n = 10)  |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(palabra, frecuencia), y = frecuencia, fill = doc_id)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
  facet_grid(cols = vars(doc_id), scales = "free") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_ipsum()
```

País

```{r}

dfm_grouped <- dfm_group(dfm_docs, groups = pais)

topfeatures(dfm_grouped, 50)

df_tidy <- convert(dfm_grouped, to = "data.frame") |> 
  pivot_longer(!doc_id,
               names_to = "palabra",
               values_to = "frecuencia")

df_tidy |> 
  group_by(doc_id) |> 
  slice_max(frecuencia, n = 20)

df_tidy  |> 
  group_by(doc_id)  |> 
  slice_max(frecuencia, n = 10)  |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(palabra, frecuencia), y = frecuencia, fill = doc_id)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
  facet_grid(cols = vars(doc_id), scales = "free") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_ipsum()
```

# Guardamos la base de datos

```{r}
write_rds(dfm_docs, "outputs/260410-data_dfm.rds")
```
